title: Pan-Seared Gyoza with Tofu Dipping Sauce
description: Crunchy pan-seared Japanese gyoza served with a creamy tofu dipping sauce. This dish is a delicious twist on traditional Asian cuisine.
instructions: Heat a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add 1 tablespoon of sesame oil and swirl to coat the pan.
Add the gyoza, leaving some space between each piece.
Pan-fry the gyoza until crispy and golden brown on the bottom (about 2-3 minutes).
Flip the gyoza and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Remove the gyoza from the pan and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
To make the tofu dipping sauce, combine the crumbled tofu, soy sauce, gochujang (if using), and grated ginger (if using) in a bowl.
Mix well until the sauce is smooth and creamy.
Serve the pan-seared gyoza with the tofu dipping sauce.
Optional: Add a sprinkle of salt and black pepper to taste.
